Based on the zoomed-in view of atom index 5 (element C), I can identify the following covalently bonded neighbor atoms:

The carbon atom (C:5) is bonded to three atoms: one nitrogen (N:4), one oxygen (O:6), and another nitrogen (N:7), forming what appears to be part of a peptide or amide linkage structure.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 5 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
